title: aaaaaaaaaa
body:
# вљ™пёЏ Funcionalidades de Jobs reaГ±adidas вљ™пёЏ

Hemos reintroducido varias mecГЎnicas de jobs que no estaban funcionando correctamente:

---

## в›ЏпёЏ Minero

вЂў `/haste` vuelve a funcionar en **nivel 10**  
в†’ A nivel mГЎximo: **30 minutos de duraciГіn** con **1h de cooldown**

вЂў `/night_vision` vuelve a funcionar en **nivel 25**  
в†’ A nivel mГЎximo: **30 minutos de duraciГіn** con **1h de cooldown**

---

## рџЊІ LeГ±ador

вЂў Recupera la habilidad de **regenerar vida al talar ГЎrboles** en **nivel 25**

---

## рџЊѕ Agricultor

вЂў Recupera la habilidad de **terraformar tierra** en **nivel 25**:

в†’ Semillas в†’ convierte en **cГ©sped**  
в†’ Setas в†’ convierte en **micelio**  
в†’ Tinte marrГіn / cocoa beans в†’ convierte en **podzol**  
в†’ рџ†• Beetroot seeds в†’ convierte en **tierra enraizada**

---

## вњЁ Enchanter

вЂў Puede volver a crear **botellas de XP** (consume 25 de XP) en **nivel 25**  
в†’ Clic derecho en la mesa de encantamientos

---

## рџ’Ћ Sistema de Slots de Encantamientos (REWORK)

El sistema ha sido completamente rediseГ±ado:

### рџ“Ќ CГіmo usarlo

вЂў Clic derecho en una **mesa de encantamientos**  
вЂў Estar **agachado (Shift)**  
вЂў Tener un **CorazГіn del Mar** en la mano  

---

### вљ™пёЏ Sistema de costes

вЂў El coste depende de tu nivel actual  
вЂў Siempre se redondea a mГєltiplos de 50  

Ejemplos:
вЂў Nivel 130 в†’ paga 100  
вЂў MГ­nimo: 50 niveles  
вЂў MГЎximo: 500 niveles  

---

### рџЋІ Riesgo vs Recompensa

вЂў Riesgo base = coste Г· 10  
в†’ 50 niveles = 5% riesgo  
в†’ 500 niveles = 50% riesgo  

#### рџ”» ReducciГіn de riesgo

вЂў Efecto de suerte (Luck): -5% por nivel  
вЂў AuraSkills Luck: -0.2% por punto  

---

### рџЋЃ Recompensa

вЂў Si tiene Г©xito в†’ recibes un **Г­tem para aumentar los slots de encantamientos**  
вЂў Cuanto mayor sea el coste, mayor serГЎ la recompensa  

---

### вљ пёЏ Resultados posibles

вњ… **Г‰xito**  
вЂў Pierdes niveles + CorazГіn del Mar  
вЂў Recibes el Г­tem de mejora de slots  
вЂў Efecto visual positivo  

вќЊ **Fallo**  
вЂў Pierdes niveles + CorazГіn del Mar  
вЂў La mesa de encantamientos **explota** рџ’Ґ  
вЂў TendrГЎs que colocar una nueva  

---

## рџ› пёЏ Otros cambios

вЂў Algunos mensajes de `/jobs` han sido corregidos  

---

## вљ пёЏ En progreso

Seguimos trabajando activamente en:

вЂў Problemas con **crafteos**  
вЂў **Traducciones**  
вЂў ГЌtems de **XP que no funcionan correctamente**

рџ™Џ Nos estГЎ llevando bastante tiempo, pero lo solucionaremos.  
Lamentamos las molestias.

рџ’љ Gracias por vuestra paciencia
author: RemoCraft Announcements

title: рџљЁрџ› пёЏ **IMPORTANT NOTICE вЂ“ CRAFTING & JOBS BUG** рџ› пёЏрџљЁ
body:
We have discovered a **bug related to crafting and jobs**.

Currently, the **money and experience gained from crafting items are not working correctly**.
We are already investigating the issue and working on a fix.

вљ пёЏ **Important recommendation:**
- Especially for **blacksmith-related jobs** (which are the most affected),
- Please **DO NOT craft items during the next few days**, until further notice.

We will announce it as soon as it is fixed. Thank you for your patience.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вљ пёЏвќ— **VERY IMPORTANT REMINDER** вќ—вљ пёЏ
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Please remember to **remove all custom enchantments** from your items **gradually over the course of this month**.

рџљЁ If you keep items with custom enchantments in your **inventory or ender chest**, there is a **risk of losing your entire inventory** during future migrations or updates.

Do it calmly, but **do not ignore this**.  
If you are not sure whether an enchantment is custom, ask or open a ticket.

Thank you for your patience and cooperation вќ¤пёЏ
author: RemoCraft Announcements

title: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
body:
рџљЁрџ› пёЏ **IMPORTANT NOTICE вЂ“ CRAFTING & JOBS BUG** рџ› пёЏрџљЁ

We have discovered a **bug related to crafting and jobs**.

Currently, the **money and experience gained from crafting items are not working correctly**.
We are already investigating the issue and working on a fix.

вљ пёЏ **Important recommendation:**
- Especially for **blacksmith-related jobs** (which are the most affected),
- Please **DO NOT craft items during the next few days**, until further notice.

We will announce it as soon as it is fixed. Thank you for your patience.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вљ пёЏвќ— **VERY IMPORTANT REMINDER** вќ—вљ пёЏ
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Please remember to **remove all custom enchantments** from your items **gradually over the course of this month**.

рџљЁ If you keep items with custom enchantments in your **inventory or ender chest**, there is a **risk of losing your entire inventory** during future migrations or updates.

Do it calmly, but **do not ignore this**.  
If you are not sure whether an enchantment is custom, ask or open a ticket.

Thank you for your patience and cooperation вќ¤пёЏ

title: Prueba 2
body:
рџ”®вњЁ **Enchant Plugin Migration Completed** вњЁрџ”®

We have successfully migrated the **enchants plugin** and also replaced the plugin responsible for **inventory, XP, health, achievements, and data synchronization** with a newer, more stable one that receives active updates and should prevent the issues weвЂ™ve had recently.

If you notice any new bugs, please open a ticket to report them.

We also believe weвЂ™ve fixed the issue where the **Blacksmith job was giving less money when crafting**.  
Money is now given **instantly** (it no longer appears in chat).

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вљЎ **New Enchant System**
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Enchants now work using **charges**:

вЂў By doing **Shift + right-click**, you refill charges.  
вЂў Each charge costs **10 XP**.  
вЂў If you place the enchanted item in an **anvil** and вЂњrepairвЂќ it using an **experience bottle**, it will recharge charges directly (more efficient), up to a maximum of **100 charges**.

WeвЂ™ll keep monitoring everything closely.  
Thanks for your patience рџ’›
author: RemoCraft Announcements
